verdict.summary: No blocker, major, or other actionable issue is evident. The producing-job attempt is preserved in worker and review/fix outputs and used in the recorder key, while dispatch records in the producing job itself. This keeps recorder-only retries idempotent and full producing-job reruns countable. The CAS retry backoff is bounded, full-jitter, and placed only between attempts; the self-tests non-vacuously cover deduplication, fresh-attempt appends, escalation counts, retry placement, exponential ceilings, and exact RNG bounds. The empty-output fallback favors recording over silently dropping an outcome. The diff does not weaken trust checks, workflow permissions, SHA pinning, audit binding, or injection/tamper stops. With zero prior and zero current findings, progress is stagnant under the mandated comparison scale.
